ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artworks" (
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artwork */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the artwork */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date of creation for the artwork */,
  "artist_culture" TEXT /* Artist or culture associated with the artwork */,
  "accession_number" TEXT /* Accession number for cataloging */,
  "medium" TEXT /* Medium of the artwork (e.g., marble, oil) */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the artwork */,
  "credit_line" TEXT /* Credit line for the artwork */,
  "rights" TEXT /* Rights information pertaining to the artwork */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the artwork */,
  "movement" TEXT /* Art movement associated with the artwork */,
  "technique" TEXT /* Technique used to create the artwork */,
  "provenance" TEXT /* Ownership history of the artwork */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the artwork's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artwork_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist or culture */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "culture" TEXT /* Cultural context or background of the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography or description of the artist */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the artist */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the artist (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exhibitions" (
  "exhibition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exhibition */,
  "exhibition_name" TEXT /* Name of the exhibition */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the exhibition */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the exhibition */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exhibition within the museum */,
  "exhibition_type" TEXT /* Type of exhibition (e.g., solo, group, temporary) */,
  "curator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the curator responsible for the exhibition */,
  "exhibition_catalog" TEXT /* Information about the exhibition catalog (e.g., publication date, publisher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exhibition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artwork_exhibitions" (
  "artwork_exhibition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the artwork-exhibition relationship */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artwork */,
  "exhibition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exhibition */,
  "display_date" TEXT /* Date the artwork was displayed in the exhibition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artwork_exhibition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artwork_exhibitions_exhibition_id FOREIGN KEY ("exhibition_id") REFERENCES exhibitions ("exhibition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artwork_exhibitions_artwork_id FOREIGN KEY ("artwork_id") REFERENCES artworks ("artwork_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., gallery name) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., gallery, storage room) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artwork in the inventory */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the artwork (e.g., on display, in storage) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the artwork is stored or displayed */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions of the artwork (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the artwork (e.g., good, fair, poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_artwork_id FOREIGN KEY ("artwork_id") REFERENCES artworks ("artwork_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging in */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., curator, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., curatorial, conservation) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of the permissions associated with this role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "acquisitions" (
  "acquisition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each acquisition record */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artwork being acquired */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date of acquisition */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source from which the artwork was acquired */,
  "price" REAL /* Price paid for the artwork */,
  "acquisition_method" TEXT /* Method of acquisition (e.g., purchase, donation) */,
  "acquisition_status" TEXT /* Status of the acquisition (e.g., pending, complete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("acquisition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acquisitions_artwork_id FOREIGN KEY ("artwork_id") REFERENCES artworks ("artwork_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restoration" (
  "restoration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restoration record */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artwork that was restored */,
  "restoration_date" TEXT /* Date of the restoration work */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the restoration performed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the restoration work */,
  "restoration_status" TEXT /* Status of the restoration work (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "restorer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restorer responsible for the work */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restoration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restoration_artwork_id FOREIGN KEY ("artwork_id") REFERENCES artworks ("artwork_id")
)
